text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur told me she's taking a dance lesson
today, so I decide to go and observe.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoooaaa!
Ah, ngh... Hyaaa!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Th-this dance is a tribute to you, my idol! Wh-what do you think?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, not bad.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohmygyhaaaah!
I'm not worthy of such praise!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What does it look like? It's a dance lesson.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Observing someone else and copying them is the
most efficient approach.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
To be totally honest, I can't make myself care
about dances I'm not interested in.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But if I don't do it, I can't race, so the best
solution is to go about it as efficiently as
possible.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Y-you mean, the best solution is to copy m-me?! Ah... aaaasdghjhk!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well, you've got a good build. Or, I guess I
should say you're athletic.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Eek.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You've got the athletic ability to perform well in
any kind of race. I can never have too much data
on you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Y-you're, um, you're giving me way too much credit! Like, if you say anything more, I'm going to literally evaporate from embarrassment!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What're you talkin' about? Take the way you just
moved, for example...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
From a single glance, I could see how you utilize
your biological leg spring. Furthermore...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's quite clear she's learning a lot from Agnes
Digital. I certainly hope she continues her
research, however...
choice_data_list:
Could there be a secret behind Agnes Digital's
movement?

You need to compare her movements to your
own as well.

You need to compare her movements to your
own as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's quite clear she's learning a lot from Agnes
Digital. I certainly hope she continues her
research, however...
choice_data_list:
Could there be a secret behind Agnes Digital's
movement?

You need to compare her movements to your
own as well.

You need to compare her movements to your
own as well.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What?! You think there's a secret behind my movement?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That's a sharp observation.
If you're doing something besides running, tell me
what it is.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um... Well, only one thing comes to mind.
But, there's no way I'm worthy of teaching you
anything!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...!
N-no, you don't have to beg like that!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Shakur! We'll start with the first trick for
concerts! Reeeeady?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wave! And wave! Wave politely! But with vigor!
Send your oshis all your gratitude!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Uh, what the hell is this?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure if this will be useful or not, but at
least she's taking in some new techniques...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait. Wait, what?! NonononoNOOO!!! You can't compare the likes of me to the Air Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, well, Trainer's got a point, though. Might
as well acquire the latest data on the differences
in our movements.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Two, three, four!
Five, six, seven, eight!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: If I just keep this up, th—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey, what happened?! How did you fall d—and why are you smiling?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's are a few bumps along the way, but Air
Shakur manages to polish her movements by
comparing herself with Agnes Digital.
